---
title: "CV"
---

Ben Spoek, M.Sc.

## Positions

- Since April 2025: Research Associate, Urban Energy Systems team, E.ON Energy Research Center, RWTH Aachen University
- June 2024 - March 2025: Research Associate, ETH Zurich
- February 2024 - May 2024: Student Research Assistant, Chair of Energy Efficient Buildings and Indoor Climate, RWTH Aachen University
- October 2021 - December 2021: Research & Development Intern, Siemens Energy, Mülheim an der Ruhr
- July 2021 - September 2021: Student Research Assistant, Chair of Thermodynamics of Mobile Energy Conversion Systems, RWTH Aachen University

## Education

- October 2022 - February 2024: M.Sc. Energy Engineering, RWTH Aachen University, completed with distinction
- July 2022 - December 2022: Semester abroad, NTNU Trondheim
- February 2021 - July 2021: Semester abroad, Politecnico di Milano
- October 2018 - July 2022: B.Sc. Mechanical Engineering with specialization in Energy Engineering, RWTH Aachen University, completed with distinction

## Thesis Work

- Master's thesis: Distributed data-driven model predictive control of building energy systems
- Bachelor's thesis: Reinforcement learning for heat pump defrosting

## Academic Activities and Recognition

- Scholarship holder of the German Academic Scholarship Foundation
- Listed on the Dean's List in every academic year
- Member of Ecurie Aix, the Formula Student team at RWTH Aachen University
